general_provisions: This bill requires the State Board of Education (state board) to study best practices regarding the use of software in public schools.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>defines terms;<hr><ltbullet>requires the state board to:<hr><ltbullet1>conduct a study regarding the use of software and digital services in public schools;<hr><ltbullet1>review best practices related to the educational effectiveness, design, and data practices of software that students use;<hr><ltbullet1>publish guidance describing best practices for the responsible use of software in a public school; and<hr><ltbullet1>upon request, report the findings of the study to the Education Interim Committee; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
